project_type: Next.js 16 website with App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
test_framework: No test framework configured - only build verification
test_command: npm run build (no separate test suite)
verification_instructions: Run npm run build in /projects/sandbox/deekshi-global-exim and confirm it succeeds with no errors
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Images use Unsplash URLs - next.config.ts already allows images.unsplash.com, plus.unsplash.com, source.unsplash.com. Can also add pixabay.com or pexels.com if needed.
contribution_requirements: Commit on main branch. Do NOT push.
key_patterns: Uses Next.js Image component with remote Unsplash URLs. Tailwind CSS with custom navy/gold color scheme defined in tailwind.config.ts. CSS variables and utilities in globals.css. Framer Motion for animations. Lucide React for icons. Premium export company branding with navy (#0B2E4F) and gold (#D4AF37) theme.
directory_structure: src/app/ contains page routes (products/page.tsx is the target). src/components/ has shared components. public/ has logo files. next.config.ts configures allowed image domains.
